---
title: ""
format: html
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section content-section">
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Academic Remote Assistance</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">
    Your Research Deserves<br><em>Undivided Attention</em>
  </h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">
    Specialized remote support for university faculty and researchers — so you spend
    less time on overhead and more time on the work that actually matters.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Inquire About Availability</a>
    <a href="#services" class="btn-ghost-wd">See What I Do ↓</a>
  </div>
</section>
<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">5+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Years in Academia</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">20+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Projects Completed</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">4</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Core Services</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-number">100%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Remote & Async</div>
  </div>
</div>
<section id="services" class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">What I Offer</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Services Built for Academics</h2>
  <p>
    Every service is designed around the real rhythm of academic life — deadlines, 
    grant cycles, submission windows, and the constant pull of competing priorities.
  </p>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</section>
```

::::::: {.grid .service-grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-1">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-icon-wrap">📄</div>
      <h3>Documentation &amp; Formatting</h3>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Precise, publication-ready documentation. From formatting complex manuscripts 
        to preparing comprehensive grant proposals, structuring detailed journal 
        rebuttals, and compiling technical reports to exact style guidelines.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Manuscripts</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Grant Writing</span>
        <span class="service-tag">APA / IEEE / ACS</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-2">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-icon-wrap">💻</div>
      <h3>Research Coding</h3>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Robust coding assistance for your research projects. Whether scripting data 
        analysis pipelines, automating repetitive tasks, or building statistical models —
        I write clean, well-documented, reproducible code your reviewers can trust.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Python / R</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Data Pipelines</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Automation</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-2">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-icon-wrap">🎨</div>
      <h3>Academic Design</h3>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Transforming complex data into clear, compelling visual narratives. I design 
        high-quality figures, schematic diagrams, and polished presentation slides 
        ready for conferences, defenses, and high-impact journals.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Figures &amp; Charts</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Conference Slides</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Infographics</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="service-card card-light shape-1">
  <div class="service-card-top">
      <div class="service-icon-wrap">⚙️</div>
      <h3>Workflow &amp; Admin</h3>
  </div>
  <div class="service-card-bottom">
      <p>
        Streamlining your academic operations end-to-end. I help organize digital 
        workspaces, manage calendars and meeting schedules, track project to-do lists, 
        and set up efficient collaboration tools for your lab or research group.
      </p>
      <div class="service-tags-container">
        <span class="service-tag">Calendar Management</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Notion / Obsidian</span>
        <span class="service-tag">Lab Coordination</span>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
:::::::

```{=html}
<section class="process-section content-section">
  <div class="section-label">The Process</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">How We Work Together</h2>
  <p>
    A simple, low-friction onboarding designed so you spend zero time learning 
    a new system.
  </p>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="process-steps">

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">1</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Discovery Call</h4>
        <p>We talk for 20–30 minutes about your current bottlenecks, deadlines, 
        and which tasks drain the most of your time.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">2</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Scoped Proposal</h4>
        <p>I send a clear, itemized proposal with deliverables, timelines, and 
        pricing — no vague retainers, no surprises.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">3</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Async Execution</h4>
        <p>Work happens on a shared workspace (Notion, Drive, or your tool of 
        choice). You get updates without being pulled into unnecessary meetings.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="process-step">
      <div class="step-num">4</div>
      <div class="step-content">
        <h4>Review &amp; Iterate</h4>
        <p>Structured feedback rounds until the deliverable meets your standard — 
        revisions are built into every engagement.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
<div class="cta-banner content-section">
  <h2>Ready to Reclaim Your Time?</h2>
  <p>
    Spots are limited — I work with a small number of clients at a time to keep 
    quality high. Let's talk about how I can support your next deadline.
  </p>
  <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Inquire About Availability →</a>
</div>
```
